name: Greed (Block Tales)
description:
dolla dolla bills!!!

Greed, an enemy character from Block Tales (Roblox video game) is a creature that you first meet when falling for a trap, the trap being a pile of tix on the ground.

It was a bit rushed, sorry if this bot isn’t good!

I don’t have much for this description like the others, so I’ll just end it here. Bye bye!!!
creator: Mr.Spookysirs
